extracted.title: LIFTED: CAPACITY REDUCTION Michigan Leg South – Brandon Road Delivery
extracted.description:
Effective immediately, ANR has completed the maintenance at Brandon Road Delivery (LOC #1402545) in the Michigan Leg South area and capacity had been reinstated to 441 MMcf/d.

Please direct any questions to your Account Coordinator, Customer Service Representative, or the Nominations and Scheduling hotline @ 800-827-5267
